title: Build a Max-Heap
description: Given an array of n integers, transform it into a max-heap using the standard bottom-up heapify algorithm (O(n)). Output the resulting array.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers.
outputSpec: The max-heap array: n integers, space-separated.

botCodes.code:
let n=ref 0
let a=Array.make 100002 0
let rec down i=if 2*i<= !n then begin let j=ref(2*i) in if 2*i+1<= !n&&a.(2*i+1)>a.(2*i) then j:=2*i+1;if a.(i)<a.(!j) then begin let t=a.(i) in a.(i)<-a.(!j);a.(!j)<-t;down !j end end
let()=n:=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id;for i=1 to !n do a.(i)<-Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id done;for i= !n/2 downto 1 do down i done;for i=1 to !n do Printf.printf"%d%c" a.(i)(if i< !n then ' ' else '\n') done
